message:
feat(core): add RateLimitTracker for quota-aware agent scheduling

Add rate_limit_tracker module that sits between the pattern detection
engine and the account selection system. Aggregates rate limit
detections per pane and provider, computes cooldown periods with
configurable retry_after defaults, and exposes per-provider status
(Clear / PartiallyLimited / FullyLimited) for the account quota
advisory system.

Key design points:
  - Bounded tracking: MAX_TRACKED_PANES (256) and MAX_EVENTS_PER_PANE (64)
    prevent unbounded growth in long-running sessions
  - Default 5-minute cooldown when no retry_after is extracted
  - ProviderRateLimitStatus is Serialize/Deserialize for robot-mode output

Register as pub mod rate_limit_tracker in lib.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
